title: Accessing cannabis for medical purposes - Canada.ca
content:
## Accessing cannabis for medical purposes
How to access cannabis for medical purposes.

## Services and information

### Using cannabis for medical purposes
General information, choosing a product, using a product, potential side effects.

### Cannabis for medical purposes under the Cannabis Act
Information on current and past regulations.

### Getting cannabis from a licensed producer
Sample medical document, list of licensed producers and how to get cannabis for medical purposes from them.

### Production of cannabis for your own medical purposes
Application for production of cannabis for own medical purposes, facts about registration and safety considerations.
